resources.string: The app you open first at the ballpark.
Sign in with your Google account to save your BASELOG activity and move between devices without losing your ballpark history.
Sprint 1 uses Firebase Authentication with Google sign-in so the same session flow can ship to production without replacing the screen layer.
Sprint 1 app structure is connected. Real data and authentication can be layered in next.
You reached Home with an active session state.
